creator: delphij@FreeBSD.org
text:
With doc/ r50251 (https://svnweb.freebsd.org/doc?view=revision&revision=50251) landed, https://www.FreeBSD.org/handbook/makeworld.html is no longer valid.

Could you please create a redirection for this one, or rename the updating-src-building link end back to 'makeworld'?
